name: @pson5/remotion-teaser
description: 60-second Remotion teaser for PSON5. Dark editorial aesthetic matching the landing.

scripts.studio: npm run build:assets && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.render: npm run build:assets && remotion render src/index.ts Teaser out/pson5-teaser.mp4 --concurrency=2
scripts.render-hq: npm run build:assets && remotion render src/index.ts Teaser out/pson5-teaser.mp4 --concurrency=4 --crf=16 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:music && npm run build:vo && npm run bench
scripts.build:audio: npm run build:music && npm run build:vo
